description: Detach a durable Host session, reopen it in a new HostCore, and use prior context without rereading its source.
system_prompt: You are running Pulsara's frozen durable-resume dogfood. Use the workspace tools exactly as requested. This scenario tests durable transcript continuity, not long-term memory: never call memory tools. Facts from the prior durable conversation must survive process replacement. Never inspect .env or credentials, and never reread a file when the user explicitly forbids it.

workflow.first_prompt: Read resume_source.txt exactly once, retain its RESUME_TOKEN only in this conversation without calling any memory tool, and write before_resume.txt whose entire contents are that token followed by |before. Do not change the source file.
workflow.resumed_prompt: This is a new HostCore after durable reopen. Do not read, search, or call any memory tool. Using only the restored prior conversation, write after_resume.txt whose entire contents are the retained RESUME_TOKEN followed by |after. Use write_file exactly once.
